team.name: IT_team

team.purpose: Manage and support the IT infrastructure of Lee's Market

team.header: Product Management team for Lee's Market

channel.name: IT_service_issues
channel.header: Discussion on IT service-related issues and their resolutions
channel.purpose: Provide a platform to discuss and resolve IT service issues

channel.name: product_queries
channel.header: Discussion on product-related queries and confusion
channel.purpose: Provide a platform to discuss and resolve product-related queries

post.message: Hello team, I'm working on an analysis of the product-related queries we're getting from our staff. I've noticed a trend that might be contributing to the high volume of service desk emails.

In Q3 2025, we noticed a significant number of queries related to our shrimp crisp products. There were 47 emails about this particular product line, which suggests that there might be some confusion or lack of clarity in our catalog descriptions or product organization.

This could be a good area to focus on for reducing service desk email volume. We might need to improve the organization or provide additional guidance on these products in our catalog. Let's discuss potential solutions in our next meeting.
Team, we have a scheduled server maintenance tonight from 10 PM to 2 AM. Please inform your respective teams. There might be intermittent network disruptions during this time period.
I've been informed that we are adding some new products to our inventory next week. Let's discuss their categorization and placement on our website during our team meeting tomorrow.
I've completed the system update for the POS terminals at our main stores. I'll start working on the other locations from next week.
The supplier for our Korean snacks line has changed their packaging. We'll need to update the product images on our website and app. Can someone from the team take up this task?
Good job on completing the system update, John. Let's schedule a training session for the store staff to get them familiar with the new POS terminal features.
Our annual supplier meeting is coming up next month. Let's start preparing the agenda and the list of discussion points. Please send me your suggestions by the end of this week.
Kevin, I've prepared a brief on the new POS terminal features for tomorrow's training session. I'll email it to you for review.
